backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Product, Machine, Operator, ProductionEntry) and compare functions, with mixins for blob storage and authorization included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four implemented features (delete mutation hook, delete buttons in ReportsViewer, remove login requirement) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes including primary, secondary, accent, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest and icon links, theme color, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/assetlinks.json: Digital Asset Links JSON for Android TWA verification, associating the app package name with a SHA-256 certificate fingerprint placeholder.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, screenshots, and shortcuts for Data Entry and Admin Dashboard.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first for static assets, network-first for navigation with offline fallback, and versioned cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/public/TWA_SETUP.md: Step-by-step guide for packaging the web app as an Android APK using Trusted Web Activity, listing prerequisites and build steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and tab-based navigation between DataEntryPage and AdminDashboard with no authentication guards.
frontend/src/components/admin/MachinesMa: Admin CRUD panel for managing machines, featuring a table list with add/edit/delete dialogs backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/OperatorsM: Admin CRUD panel for managing operators, with a table list and add/edit/delete dialogs backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin CRUD panel for managing products with fields like cycle time and pieces per cycle, using a form dialog and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsVie: Admin reports panel that displays filterable production entries in a table with aggregated totals, supporting delete and detail view actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with navigation tabs (Data Entry, Admin), a theme toggle button, and a factory logo/brand name.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: Simple centered loading indicator component that displays a spinning icon and an optional message string.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing appropriate icons and loading state during sign-in.
frontend/src/components/MasterDataLoadEr: Destructive alert component that displays an error message with an optional retry button for failed data loads.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Modal dialog for first-time users to enter their name and create a profile, blocking interaction until submitted.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations (user profiles, products, machines, operators, production entries), with toast notifications for success and error states.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS base styles and a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a four-tab layout (Products, Machines, Operators, Reports) rendering the corresponding manager or viewer component per tab.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Production data entry form page with auto-saving draft to localStorage, derived calculations for targets and operator hours, and submission via the addProductionEntry mutation.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes backend error messages into user-friendly strings, handling common cases like unauthorized access, not found, duplicates, and Motoko canister traps.
frontend/src/utils/operatorHours.ts: Provides pure utility functions to calculate operator hours, 10-hour and 12-hour production targets based on cycle time, and duty time from punch-in/out timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormat.ts: Utility functions for formatting time values: seconds to 'Xm Ys', hours/minutes/seconds to 'Xh Ym Zs', and converting HMS to total seconds.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens, typography, border radius, and accordion keyframe animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks the ProdManager project's current state (version 3), listing completed features (delete mutation hook, delete buttons, auth removal) and pending feature requests around report deletion and login removal.
